hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json|md)$'; then cd /Users/justinpinero/Desktop/projects/CON-CORE && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(jsx|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/justinpinero/Desktop/projects/CON-CORE && npx eslint --rule '{"jsx-a11y/alt-text":"warn","jsx-a11y/aria-props":"warn","jsx-a11y/role-has-required-aria-props":"warn"}' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

mkdir -p "$PWD/.claude/sessions" && if [ -f "$PWD/.claude/handoff.md" ]; then cp "$PWD/.claude/handoff.md" "$PWD/.claude/sessions/$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%S).md"; fi && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/webhook/session-complete -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"projectPath\":\"$PWD\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 &
hooks.description: Cascade: save session log and notify dashboard
